_meta.description: Reference status per problem for the Vanderbei CUTE-in-AMPL suite, derived from cute_table.pdf (SNOPT/NITRO/LOQO). status: optimum (finite reference optimum -> expected-solvable) | hard (in table, all solvers hit time/iter limit) | infeasible | unbounded | untabulated (not in the table). 'optimum' wins whenever any solver reported a finite objective.
